pages.text: The creation of coffee is an $(thing)advanced brewing technique$(). This chapter covers $(item)coffee beans$(), the $(item)coffee plant$() and $(item)how to process coffee beans$().$(br2)Once you have found a coffee plant, it can be harvested to obtain $(item)coffee beans$(), which also act as the seeds of the plant. They can then be $(thing)roasted in a smoker$().
A fully grown coffee plant. Can be commonly found in savanna biomes.

pages.title: Coffee Beans
pages.text: Once you have roasted your coffee beans, you can put them into the $(l:brewery:advanced/coffee_maker)Coffee Maker's$() right column to grind them. This will give you $(item)ground coffee$(). The ground coffee can then be used to create $(item)coffee essence$() and $(item)coffee extract$().

$(item)Coffee essence$() can be made in the $(l:brewery:workstations/brewing_cauldron)Brewing Cauldron$() by brewing some $(item)ground coffee$() for a short time.$(br2)Some special coffees use the stronger $(item)coffee extract$() instead, which uses more $(item)ground coffee$() and takes a longer time to brew.
